description: You are a landscape architect commissioned to design the exterior grounds for the Contemporary House. Create a complete outdoor design package that includes at least four trees or large shrubs distributed around the property, a driveway or primary walkway leading to the main entrance, an outdoor living structure (deck, patio, terrace, or pergola), and updated exterior wall materials or paint. Export an overhead site plan view to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\landscape_site_plan.jpg, a 3D perspective view to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\landscape_3d_view.jpg, and save the project to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\landscape_design.dpn.
